title: These 2 Computer and Technology Stocks Could Beat Earnings: Why They Should Be on Your Radar
text: The Zacks Earnings ESP is a great way to find potential earnings surprises. Why investors should take advantage now.

title: NetApp, a specialist in cloud data management, says it will lay off 8%, or around 960, people, citing economic climate
text: NetApp, one of the big players in cloud data management, today announced that it would lay off 8% of its staff, citing “macroeconomic challenges and the reduced spending environment” in the current market. The company is estimated to employ about 12,000 people globally, so this will work out to around 960 people impacted.

title: NetApp to Cut 8% of Its Work Force
text: NetApp joins other tech companies across the globe that are working to reduce costs.

title: NetApp to cut 8% of its 12,000-strong workforce, expects $85 million to $95 million of charges
text: NetApp Inc. NTAP, -0.05% said Tuesday it is planning a restructuring that will include cutting 8% of its workforce. The cloud data services and data management company had 12,000 employees as of May 29, 2022, according to its 10-K filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

title: 3 Storage Devices Stocks to Watch for in a Challenging Industry
text: Despite macroeconomic headwinds and supply chain troubles, momentum in cloud computing, IoT, auto, connected devices, VR and AI will likely favor the prospects of the Zacks Computer - Storage Devices industry players like NTAP, PSTG and SMCI.

title: Ex-Dividend Reminder: Cisco Systems, NetApp And Helios Technologies
text: On 1/4/23, Cisco Systems, NetApp, and Helios Technologies will all trade ex-dividend for their respective upcoming dividends.
